{{Infobox technique
| name = Ruler technique
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Ruler technique Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Ruler techniques]] are specialized methods used by [[sacred artists]] to manipulate the [[vital aura]] present in the surrounding environment. Unlike other techniques that focus on the manipulation of an individual's own [[madra]], [[Ruler techniques]] use [[madra]] as a catalyst to exert control over external elements such as wind, water, fire, light, or blood. This allows an artist to influence the physical world by commanding natural forces, such as creating walls of wind, lifting bodies of water, or manipulating the [[aura]] within a person's blood. These techniques vary significantly depending on an artist's specific [[Path]]. For example, those on the [[Path of the White Fox]] can use [[Ruler techniques]] to create illusions or manipulate dreams and light to affect a target's mind. Other applications include using force aura to move objects or utilizing blood [[aura]] to cause physical symptoms like seizures or paralysis. While [[Ruler techniques]] can be incredibly powerful and widespread, they generally require significant concentration and time to build compared to more immediate [[Striker]] or [[Enforcer techniques]]. They can be layered with other methods, such as [[Forger]] or [[Striker techniques]], to create complex, multi-faceted attacks. Mastery of these techniques is often achieved through repetitive practice under various conditions, which engraves the necessary patterns into the user's spirit.}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[First Elder]] of the [[Wei clan]] is rumored to know the [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17">''Unsouled'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|A [[Ruler technique]] can allow a user to call up [[aura]] from every [[sword]] in a room.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A [[Ruler technique]] is the ability to manipulate compatible [[aura]] in the surrounding world.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c1">''Soulsmith'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Endless Sword]] is a [[Ruler technique]] that gives her [[Path]] its name.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3">''Soulsmith'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]]'s [[Ruler technique]] produced an eruption of [[sword aura]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18">''Soulsmith'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Techniques on [[Yerin's Path]] are half a [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] can launch a [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|There is a [[stone tablet]] explaining the [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Ruler technique]] is a power used by [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Ruler techniques]] can be used to add force aura to a push.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn Underlord]] used a [[Ruler technique]] to command the air and lock people in place.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5">''Skysworn'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Ruler technique]] can fall apart if concentration is split too many ways.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4">''Ghostwater'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Longhook]] can use a [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|A [[Ruler]] technique is capable of manifesting as a long wall of wind or appearing as white mist within a boundary field. This power can be used to manipulate black roots or transform loose dust and stones into lethal projectiles. Despite these versatile applications, the technique proved unable to catch [[Lindon]] during their encounter.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|A [[Ruler technique]] can form a long wall of wind.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c2">''Underlord'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|A [[Ruler technique]] was used to manipulate black roots.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Ruler technique]] could not catch [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|A [[Ruler technique]] appears as white mist within the boundary field.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|A [[Ruler technique]] can turn loose stones and dust into deadly projectiles.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Naru]] have been known to employ a [[Ruler]] technique, though such abilities can be dispersed by the [[pure madra]] of [[Eithan]] or broken by a gold [[dragon]]. These techniques can manifest as a spike in blood [[aura]], and [[Naian Blackflame]] has also utilized this power. Complex layering of techniques may necessitate the simultaneous use of [[Ruler]], [[Striker]], and [[Forger]] abilities. During the construction of a Void Dragon's Dance, [[Lindon]] has also made use of a [[Ruler]] technique.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The gold [[dragon]] can break a [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8">''Uncrowned'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|A [[Ruler technique]] was dispersed by [[Eithan]]'s [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Naru]] used a [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|A blood [[aura]] spike can be a [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ruler technique]] is used by [[Naian Blackflame]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Layering techniques may require using a [[Ruler technique]], [[Striker technique]], and [[Forger technique]] simultaneously.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] uses a [[Ruler technique]] while building a Void Dragon's Dance.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ruler techniques]] are specialized abilities that allow a user to command nearby [[aura]] to obey them or accompany the working of their will. During various conflicts, these techniques have been employed by attackers and enemies alike, including [[Red Faith]] and the Silent Servant. The versatility of these powers is evident in their use to seal fortress wall stones, strip logs, spread storms, or manifest unnatural terror. While [[Lindon]] has struggled to gain control over such a technique, others like [[Calan Archer]] have been seen cycling them, and [[Yan Shoumei]] has used one to control her [[Endless Sword]] technique. Furthermore, an [[Archlord]]'s [[Ruler]] technique can be repelled with [[soulfire]], and Sophara has demonstrated the ability to push one aside while soaring.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">15</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The attackers use [[Ruler techniques]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1">''Wintersteel'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] struggled for control of a [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Red Faith]] uses a [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A [[Ruler technique]] was used to seal the stone of the fortress wall together.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Ruler technique]] allows a user to call nearby [[aura]] to obey them.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ruler techniques]] can be used to strip logs.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The unnatural terror was a [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] cycles the [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan]]'s [[Ruler technique]] spread a storm.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|An [[Archlord]]'s [[Ruler technique]] can be pushed away using [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The Silent Servant completed her [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ruler techniques]] were used by enemies during the battle.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]]'s [[Endless Sword]] technique was under the control of her [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara pushed the [[Ruler technique]] aside while soaring.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A [[Ruler technique]] can be used to accompany the working of will.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|During a period when the [[Heaven’s Glory School]] was actively collecting various [[Ruler techniques]], these abilities were shown to be capable of producing poisonous gas. The Matriarch demonstrated the power of such a technique, which was being utilized by [[Elder Rahm]] at the time. Eventually, [[Lindon]] learned to blend a [[Ruler]] technique with his own [[madra]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Heaven’s Glory School]] was gathering [[Ruler techniques]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Ruler techniques]] can be used to create poisonous gas.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The Matriarch used a [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Elder Rahm]] was in the middle of a [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] blended the [[Ruler technique]] with [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Jai Long]] used an incomplete [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6">''Reaper'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Tomb Hydra's binding]]'s [[Ruler technique]] did not activate because there was no death [[aura]] nearby.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] was preparing a [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A [[Ruler technique]] can seize [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9">''Dreadgod'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A [[Ruler technique]] controlled the wind [[aura]] around [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The legion tried to break the [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A [[Ruler technique]] was used to lift the castle.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Ruler technique]] can bring out specific memories.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A [[Ruler technique]] allows for the control of [[aura]] in an [[arena]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]]'s [[Ruler technique]] can latch onto people and make their blood boil.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Anagi]] uses a [[Ruler technique]] that batters with waves.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A machine used in the cafeteria activated something like a [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“And when I call up aura from every sword in the room?”

That was a Ruler technique, and he saw where she was heading.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“Break,” he commanded, adding authority to his Ruler technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
